fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT % that was used on the sales or purchase lines with this VAT Identifier.

fields.name: VAT Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total net amount (amount excluding VAT) for sales or purchase lines with a specific VAT Identifier.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of VAT that is included in the total amount.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the amounts, including VAT, on all the lines on the document.

fields.name: VAT Identifier
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contents of this field from the VAT Identifier field in the VAT Posting Setup table.

fields.name: Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net VAT amount that must be paid for products on the line.

fields.name: Inv. Disc. Base Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice discount base amount.

fields.name: Invoice Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice discount amount for a specific VAT identifier.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how VAT will be calculated for purchases or sales of items with this particular combination of VAT business posting group and VAT product posting group.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the Tax Group Code from the sales or purchase lines.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Contains the sum of quantities from the sales or purchase lines.

fields.name: Modified
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Use Tax
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Calculated VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calculated VAT amount and is only used for reference when the user changes the VAT Amount manually.

fields.name: VAT Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the calculated VAT amount and a VAT amount that you have entered manually.

fields.name: Positive
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Includes Prepayment
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: VAT Clause Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT Clause Code that is associated with the sales line information that is described in statistics windows and printed documents.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the transaction for which VAT is not applied due to the type of goods or services purchased.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of VAT that is not deducted due to the type of goods or services purchased.

fields.name: Calc. Non-Ded. VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calculated Non-Deductible VAT amount and is only used for reference when the user changes the Non-Deductible VAT Amount manually.

fields.name: Deductible VAT Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the transaction for which VAT is applied due to the type of goods or services purchased.

fields.name: Deductible VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of VAT that is deducted due to the type of goods or services purchased.
